Notice Of Motion And Motion To Replace Arthur N. Harris As Court Appointed Receiver With Michael Brewer As Receiver;
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCATION INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Replace Arthur N. Harris As Court Appointed Receiver With Michael Brewer As Receiver is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion for Appointment of a Receiver and to Appoint Richard B. Cole as Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
